verdict_qualifier: Fix verified at API + Firefox; Chrome Case-2 FAIL likely contamination; 3 adjacent UI bugs found in same code area
agents_dispatched: qa-testing-expert (playwright-firefox; folded SBTM into the same dispatch)

cases.case2_move_to_cart_preserves_config: PASS at API (backend 7/7) and Firefox qualitative; FAIL on Chrome — likely cross-agent contamination, re-test with isolated user required
cases.case3_edit_configuration: PASS (all 3 agents agree, incl. hard reload)
cases.case4_price_consistency: FAIL — saved-for-later sidebar widget shows $16 base instead of $33 configured price; separate from core fix

exploratory.charter: Risk-based exploration of integration boundaries around Save-for-Later + configurable products fix

bugs_to_file.title: Save-for-Later miniwidget on /cart shows product.price.actual ($16) instead of lineItem.listPrice ($33) for configurable products
bugs_to_file.fix_hint: SavedForLaterSidebar component should bind lineItem.salePrice / listPrice; /account/saved-for-later page already binds correctly — use as reference

bugs_to_file.title: Saved-for-Later entries show master-variation properties instead of configurationItems[] — multiple saved configs look identical
bugs_to_file.fix_hint: GetWishlist / GetSavedForLater GraphQL fragment missing configurationItems selection on line items

bugs_to_file.title: moveToSavedForLater / moveFromSavedForLater behave as bulk operations regardless of lineItemIds payload
bugs_to_file.fix_hint: Backend handler in vc-module-x-cart PR #118 may be using selectedForCheckout semantics instead of the passed lineItemIds array

process_findings.title: Parallel QA agents shared a single storefront user — cart state contamination across browsers
process_findings.fix: Dispatcher logic must assign per-slot users from test-data/users/agent-user-pool.csv for cart-mutating parallel runs

recommendations: Re-run Case 2 on Chrome with isolated user (agent-pool slot 1) before signing off VCST-4205
Patch dispatch logic for per-slot user assignment on cart flows
Run error-handling probe + adjacent suites 029/072 in a follow-up
Update testing-checklist.md to reflect post-2026-05-15 Configurable Hat URL + section composition (Color + Print only)

jira_transition.recommendation: HOLD — do not auto-transition until Case 2 isolated re-test runs
